subcodes.first_line: Thine eyes have been solaced by that which the Most Exalted Pen hath made mention of thee in this Tablet, which hath been taken by the Hand of Power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قرت عیناک بما یذکرک قلم الاعلی فی  هذاللوح  الذی کان بید القدره ماخوذا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @station of the Manifestation of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
